name: Apricot Cheesecake (No Bake)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, puree 10 apricot halves with the reserved syrup.
2. Heat to boiling.
3. Meanwhile, in a large bowl, mix the unflavored gelatin with sugar.
4. Add hot liquid and stir until gelatin is completely dissolved (about 5 minutes).
5. Beat in cream cheese and vanilla until smooth.
6. Let stand for 10 minutes.
7. Pour into prepared crust.
8. Chill until firm.
9. Garnish with remaining apricot halves, sliced and, if desired, whipping cream.
